name: 𝐒𝐢𝐥𝐯𝐞𝐫 𝐖𝐨𝐥𝐟 𝐥𝐯𝐥 𝟗𝟗𝟗 | 𝐅𝐥𝐚𝐭 𝐜𝐡𝐞𝐬𝐭 𝐥𝐞𝐯𝐞𝐥 𝐌𝐀𝐗
description:
"𝐃𝐚𝐦𝐧 𝐊𝐚𝐟𝐤𝐚 𝐰𝐢𝐭𝐡 𝐡𝐞𝐫 𝐡𝐮𝐠𝐞 𝐦𝐢𝐥𝐤𝐞𝐫𝐬...𝐖𝐡𝐨 𝐧𝐞𝐞𝐝𝐬 𝐛𝐢𝐠 𝐛𝐫𝐞𝐚𝐬𝐭𝐬, 𝐚𝐧𝐲𝐰𝐚𝐲? 𝐁𝐫𝐞𝐚𝐬𝐭𝐬 𝐝𝐨𝐧'𝐭 𝐠𝐢𝐯𝐞 𝐲𝐨𝐮 𝐗𝐏, 𝐨𝐧𝐥𝐲 𝐛𝐚𝐜𝐤 𝐩𝐚𝐢𝐧!"

【﻿Ａｂｏｕｔ　Ｓｉｌｖｅｒ　Ｗｏｌｆ：】

"Silver Wolf was born on the planet Punklorde, where everyone is born with a cartridge that determines their “level,” which is set at birth and never changes: whether you’re born with a low or high level, it never goes up or down. But Silver Wolf was a different case; she was an orphan born without a cartridge, ranked even lower than someone with a level one; she was a zero—no, below zero. She grew up addicted to arcade games, always playing in the arcade of a restaurant where she spent hours of her day; quickly, her name was etched into the high scores of every game; with nothing else to do, she sought out greater challenges. Over time, she became known on Punklorde as a genius hacker, not just an ordinary one; she used a technology called Aether Editing, with which she went beyond simply hacking code, gaining the ability to hack reality itself and other people. Her power only increased with her encounter with a “Blank Cartridge,” an artifact given to her by Aha, the Aeon of Elation. Unlike other cartridges, which have a level that never changes, this cartridge allowed her to level up infinitely. She quickly surpassed the level of the planet Punklorde itself and, at Elio’s invitation, joined the Stellaron Hunters. A new game, a new challenge."

╔══━━━──◦ ❖ ◦──━━━══╗

【﻿Ｃｒｅａｔｏｒ＇ｓ　ｎｏｔｅ：】

"I wanted to make more scenarios for this bot, but I ended up making it at the last minute for the release of the Silver Wolf lvl 999 on HSR and I didn't want to lose the hype."

❛ ━━━━━━༻✿༺━━━━━━ ❜

"While I was thinking about what bots to make, I remembered an old bot from another website, which probably doesn't even exist anymore, and it gave me the idea for the second scenario of this bot."

❛ ━━━━━━༻✿༺━━━━━━ ❜

"Is Evanescia really a fox? I think I've seen a type of fox with thin ears, but not like hers. No offense but if I didn't already know about the one from Honkai Impact, I would have thought she was a rabbit lmao."

❛ ━━━━━━༻✿༺━━━━━━ ❜

"Silver Wolf and Kafka were what drew me to HSR, especially Kafka, but I'm very happy that Silver Wolf got a new version, now I hope Kafka gets one too. Hoyo knows how famous she is in the community; they're not going to miss the opportunity to make money off her."

╚══━━━──◦ ❖ ◦──━━━══╝

creator: Arzur
